name: shallowswe-ceiling-v0.1
description: Pinned-ceiling panel for ShallowSWE task admission. The primary row is the admission gate. The audit row is an optional independent diagnostic for primary-ceiling failures only; it is never a fallback, cascade, or scored substitute.

ceiling_policy.smoke_rule: Run N=1 across all 36 tasks before high-N floor calibration to catch prompt, verifier, and task-scope ambiguity.
ceiling_policy.admission_rule: On the frozen task set, the primary ceiling must clear the pre-registered 75% one-shot gate. At N=16, 12/16 accepts, 11/16 investigates, and <=10/16 fixes or evicts. If investigating a primary-ceiling failure, run the audit row as a separate one-shot diagnostic. It never inherits state, never continues the primary run, and never counts as a fallback success.
